verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let everything within me, cry Holy Let everything within me, cry Holy Holy, Holy, Holy is the Lamb that was slain.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let everything within me, cry Glory Let everything within me, cry Glory Glory, glory, glory to the Lamb that was slain

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let everything within me, cry Jesus Let everything within me, cry Jesus Jesus, Jesus, Jesus is the Lamb that was slain.
